case_title: KA HUNG HO VS. JUAN MARTIN GARCIA

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HO, KA HUNG AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JUAN MARTIN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-12-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-15-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST PHILIP R. WELTIN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-05-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-20-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF HO, KA HUNG
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-12-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS.
